briefdescription.para: Vector of type double with B filter coefficents.
Vector of type double with A filter coefficents.

detaileddescription.para: filter order

briefdescription.para: length of edge transients
Vector of type double with intermediate result.
Vector of type double with intermediate result.

detaileddescription.para: filter order

briefdescription.para: Poiter to B filter coefficents.
Poiter to A filter coefficents.
Poiter to intermediate result vector.
Vector of type double with B filter coefficents.
Vector of type double with A filter coefficents.
Vector of type double with intermediate result.

detaileddescription.para: previous calculated X values X(n-1) .. X(n-4)

briefdescription.para: previous calculated Y values Y(n-1) .. Y(n-4)
CFilter class destructor.

detaileddescription.para: The destructor is never called and is implemented only for completion reasons. It simply triggers a debug message on info debug level.

briefdescription.para: Function to calculate initial conditions for forward filtering.

detaileddescription.para:
leftpad
The output vector of type double
InputStart
The input vector of type double
The function calculate initial conditions for forward filtering and store it in output vector leftpad.

briefdescription.para: Function to calculate initial conditions for forward filtering.

detaileddescription.para:
rightpad
The output vector of type double
InputEnd
The input vector of type double
The function calculate initial conditions for backward filtering and store it in output vector rightpad.

briefdescription.para: Function to prepair the forward filtering.

detaileddescription.para:
leftpad_0
The value of leftpad vector at index 0
The function prepairs the forward filtering. It shall be called before start of forward filtering with function filterFirstIter.

briefdescription.para: Function to prepair the backward filtering.

detaileddescription.para:
rightpad_reverse_0
The value of rightpad reversed vector at index 0
The function prepairs the backward filtering. It shall be called before start of backward filtering with function filterFirstIter.

briefdescription.para: Function to start forward or backward filtering with first iteration.

detaileddescription.para:
X
The input vector of type double
Y
The output vector of type double
The function resize output vector Y with the same size as input vector X and initialize pointer variables to these vectors. It than initialize the vectors with the previous X and Y values with size 4 and initial values 0. Afterwards the function enters a loop over all input samples and calculate the filtered result values, store it in output vector and store the previous X and Y values for the calculation in the next iteration.

briefdescription.para: Function to resume forward or backward filtering with next iteration.

detaileddescription.para:
X
The input vector of type double
Y
The output vector of type double
The function resize output vector Y with the same size as input vector X, insert the previous X and Y values from last iteration at the beginning of input and output vector by< call of function insert and initialize pointer variables to these vectors. Afterwards the function enters a loop over all input samples and calculate the filtered result values, store it in output vector and store the previous X and Y values for the calculation in the next iteration.

briefdescription.para: Function to finish forward or backward filtering with last iteration.

detaileddescription.para:
X
The input vector of type double
Y
The output vector of type double
The function resize output vector Y with the same size as input vector X, insert the previous X and Y values from last iteration at the beginning of input and output vector by< call of function insert and initialize pointer variables to these vectors. Afterwards the function enters a loop over all input samples and calculate the filtered result values and store it in output vector.

briefdescription.para: Initialization of the filtfilt method.

detaileddescription.para:
B
The B filter coefficients
A
The A filter coefficients
The function assign parameter A and B to the member vector variables b_coeff and a_coeff, calculate the filter order and length of edge transients and store them in member variables. Afterwards it set up and calculate the filter's initial conditions to remove DC offset problems at the beginning and end of the sequence.

briefdescription.para: Getter function to retrieve the length of edge transients.

detaileddescription.para:
The length of edge transients
The function returns the length of edge transients

briefdescription.para: Getter function to retrieve the filter order.

detaileddescription.para:
The filter order
The function returns the filter order

briefdescription.para: The inst function to retrieve the exclusiv only instance of the class.

detaileddescription.para:
Returns a pointer to the class instance
In case there is no instance created, the constructor will be called to create the instance. Finally a pointer to the instance is returned.

briefdescription.para: CFilter class constructor.

detaileddescription.para: The constructor is declared as private according to singleton pattern. It is called in the static inst function to create the exclusiv only instance of the class.

memberdef.argsstring: (vectori &indices, int beg, int end, int inc=1)
memberdef.name: add_index_range

briefdescription.para: Function to add index values in vector.

detaileddescription.para:
indices
The output vector with the indices
beg
Start index
end
End index
inc
Increment value
In a loop the function add current index to the vector indices from start to end index with an increment of parameter inc.

briefdescription.para: Function to add constant values in vector.

detaileddescription.para:
indices
The output vector with the constants
value
The constant value
numel
Number of elements in vector, also used as index
In a loop over the number of elements in the vector the function add the constant value at current index to the vector indices.

briefdescription.para: Function to append a vector to another vector.

detaileddescription.para:
vec
The joined output vector
tail
The vector to be appended
With call of function insert vector tail of type double will be appended to vector vec also of type double.

briefdescription.para: Function to reverse a sub-vector.

detaileddescription.para:
vec
The vector
idx_end
The end index
idx_start
The start index
Returns the reversed vector
The function copies the sub-vector from vector vec using start and end index to vector result, reverse it by calling method reverse and return it to calling function.

briefdescription.para: Function to retrieve the maximum value from a vector.

detaileddescription.para:
vec
The vector
Returns the maximum value of the vector
The function retrieve the maximum value of the vector of the vector by calling function max_element and return it to calling function.

briefdescription.para: Sub-Function to prepair the forward filtering.

detaileddescription.para:
B
The B filter coefficients
A
The A filter coefficients
Zi
Intermediate result
The function prepairs the forward filtering. It shall be called before start of forward filtering with function filterFirstIter.

briefdescription.para: Digital filter class implemented according to C++ singleton design pattern.

simplesect.title: Detailed Description
simplesect.para: The CFilter class handle digital zero phase filtering of recoreded acceleration data. It is implemented to filter the data sequentially and piecewise as the data is received from FRAM. For zero phase filtering the data will be filtered forward and backwards. The class provides methods to initialize forward and backward filtering, to filter the data in first, Nth and last iteration and functions to provide the filter order nfilt and the length of edge transients nfact. It also provides methods to calculate the initial conditions for forward and backward filtering.
